headline: Is Skyworks Solutions (SWKS) Finally Reset After A 66% Five Year Share Price Pullback?
summary: If you are wondering whether Skyworks Solutions is currently priced for opportunity or risk, this article walks through key clues in the current share price and what they might mean for you. The stock recently closed at US$59.46, with returns of 5.2% over 7 days, 9.2% over 30 days, 9.3% over 1 year, but a 7.7% decline year to date and deeper pullbacks of 38.0% over 3 years and 65.8% over 5 years. These mixed returns have put valuation questions back on the table for many investors,...
